coupon.source_phrase_block: Print from home pass. 50 % discount for up to 4 tickets. For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/ Select a date to visit Spectacle Island or Georges Island Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details Enter the library's unique code found printed on the pass in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply
